description: Public lexical category schema used for manuscript-level feature construction. The full curated Korean lexicon is not included in this public release.

derived_features.domain_entropy: Mean daily Shannon entropy over lexical main domains.
derived_features.global_sub_entropy: Shannon entropy over pooled sub-domain counts across the aligned observation window.
derived_features.lag1_word_jaccard_mean: Mean adjacent-day Jaccard overlap of unique word sets.
